changes: 3 CRITICAL new events from April 3: (1) UAE Habshan gas complex SECOND SHUTDOWN — debris from intercepted missile caused fire, ~60% of domestic gas offline (Bloomberg Apr 3); (2) Kuwait Mina Al-Ahmadi refinery struck 3RD TIME — fires in multiple units (The National, Al Jazeera Apr 3); (3) Kuwait power/desalination plant struck 2ND TIME (Al Jazeera Apr 3). Added Saudi Manifa field to infrastructure (Rystad). Updated UAE gas from 5.5 to 4.0 Bcf/d. Updated Brent to ~$109 ($99-$110). 225 Kpler crossings since Mar 1 (94% decline). Rystad: 11,535 kboe/d upstream disrupted. No new FM declarations.
